case_title: RENITA HEAD VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY HEAD, RENITA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CONTRERAS, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED & REQUESTING NEW HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEAD, RENITA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEAD, RENITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CONTRERAS, ANNA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
